bridge.name: IntelligenceUniverseBridge
bridge.definition: intelligence as a finite admissible projection-reconstruction engine of a more general universe-generative mathematical law
bridge.formal: Intelligence ~= finite viable projector + reconstructor over UGMT-governed admissible state manifolds

verdict.core_answer: Intelligence can understand the universe because it is not external to the universe's lawful structure: it is a finite system that projects, compresses, reconstructs, and survives within the same admissible mathematical order.
